chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 707 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No. 3147/2024 (Exemption) 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For order on CMA No.3148/2024 (Stay) 15.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar Advocate for the Applicant Per learned counsel this is a case of time barred adjudication, the matter has been decided by the Supreme Court by a five members Bench in Wak Limited Multan Road Lahore vs. Collector Central Excise and Sales Tax Lahore (now CIR, LTU Lahore) reported as 2025 SCMR 1280, therefore, he seeks that in mutatis mutandis ratio the reference may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad PS
